purpose: Phase polarized sinusoidal signature structure into v14 without breaking the current Stage 1/2 field model. Preserve peaks, bands, corridor, diffusion, and trace, while adding polarity and zero-crossing awareness so v15 can emerge naturally.

intent: prepare for later component-native v15 evolution

not_yet: replacement of peaks/bands with pure sinusoidal basis
phase_identity.goal: Add polarity, zero-crossing, and lightweight component summaries to the existing signature-native loop.

conceptual_shift.before: signature interpreted mainly through peaks, bands, and corridor support
conceptual_shift.after: signature interpreted as a polarized field where peaks and bands are lobe structure and zero crossings are candidate emission/cancellation axes
conceptual_shift.frozen_statement: The signature is a polarized distribution over family space. Peaks and troughs encode opposite orientation branches, while emitted continuation corresponds to shared zero-crossing cancellation axes.

polarity.meaning: sign branch or local orientation branch per family slot

zero_crossings.meaning: detected cancellation axes or sign-transition locations

mode_index.meaning: coarse local family-mode label or inferred component index

component_summary.meaning: lightweight summary of dominant polarized component structure

signature_field_interpretation.peak: local maximum of positive or negative lobe support
signature_field_interpretation.band: connected support region of a lobe after diffusion
signature_field_interpretation.zero_crossing: shared cancellation axis between opposite-polarity branches

changes: provide helper to recompute component summary from amplitude/phase/polarity
add polarity-aware peak labeling (positive vs negative lobe peaks)
add zero-crossing detection from neighboring sign changes
keep existing peak/band outputs for compatibility
add optional weighting from local polarity consistency
add optional weighting from proximity to zero-crossing axes
refresh polarity and zero-crossings after diffusion and band refresh
record dominant polarity before/after each phase
record zero crossings before/after each phase

optional_file_to_add.note: Optional; logic can also live in signature_state.py and peak_detector.py if you prefer fewer files.

polarity_threshold.meaning: values with magnitude below this are treated as near-neutral when assigning polarity

zero_crossing_threshold.meaning: minimum neighboring contrast for a sign transition to count as a stable zero crossing

corridor_zero_crossing_bonus.meaning: small corridor weighting based on proximity to a stable zero-crossing axis

corridor_polarity_consistency_bonus.meaning: small corridor weighting for stable local polarity support

enable_polarized_signature_summary.meaning: emit dominant component summary into state and trace

polarity_assignment.rule: polarity[i] = +1 if amplitude[i] > polarity_threshold, -1 if amplitude[i] < -polarity_threshold, else 0
polarity_assignment.note: If amplitude is clipped nonnegative in current implementation, compute polarity from signed pre-clamp or signed delta field instead.

zero_crossing_detection.rule: A zero crossing exists where adjacent family slots have opposite polarity and both exceed zero_crossing_threshold in absolute support or contrast.

dominant_component_summary.meaning: A lightweight summary of the strongest polarized lobe / component, not a full spectral decomposition.

important_implementation_note.warning: If amplitude is currently clipped to [0,1], polarity cannot be read directly from final amplitude alone.
recommended_solution: derive polarity from signed pre-clamp update field
or derive polarity from signed projection/gated_delta before final clipping
or add an auxiliary signed_field buffer for polarity-only interpretation

corridor_adjustment.strategy: Keep corridor behavior mostly unchanged, but add small structural bias terms.

constraints: do not replace existing band support logic

purpose: show whether a phase reinforces or flips branch orientation
show whether reasoning moves toward or away from stable cancellation axes

in_reasoning_loop_after_diffusion: corridor = build_corridor(peaks, bands, amplitude=current_amplitude, polarity=polarity, zero_crossings=zero_crossings)

success_criteria: v14 still runs and existing tests still pass with minimal adjustments
state artifact now includes polarity, zero crossings, and component summary
trace exposes polarity before/after and zero-crossing evolution per phase
signature is now interpretable as polarized structure rather than only peak/band support

next_after_phase_1.phase_2: make corridor explicitly zero-crossing and polarity aware
next_after_phase_1.phase_3: promote component summaries into native polarized components
next_after_phase_1.phase_4: let operators act directly on polarized components
next_after_phase_1.phase_5: v15 emerges naturally as fully polarized-signature-native

one_line_summary: Phase 1 adds polarity and zero-crossing structure to v14 so the current field model can be reinterpreted as a polarized signature surface without breaking the existing reasoning loop.
